name: Suspicious Number of Account Lockouts
notes:
This rule triggers when unusual number of user accounts are locked out.

Note: Tune the rule accordingly to the compliance requirement.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Locked
when at least 30 events are seen with the same Log Source and different Username in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 30 events are seen with the same Log Source and different Username in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Number of Account Lockouts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Locked
AND when at least 30 events are seen with the same Log Source and different Username in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Number of Account Lockouts
Event description: Detects when unusual number of user accounts are locked out.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Log Source
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
